name: Shanghai Dumplings
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the banana into about fifteen pieces.
2. Wrap each banana slice in a won-ton or potsticker wrapper.
3. Heat oil in a deep fryer or heavy skillet to 350°F (175°C).
4. Carefully place the wrapped bananas into the hot oil and fry until golden brown, approximately 2-3 minutes per side.
5. Remove the dumplings from the oil using tongs and let them cool on a paper towel-lined plate.
6. Once cooled, dust the dumplings with powdered sugar.
